summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Métro-Taxi Central Matching Algorithm. All 18 backend API tests passed (100%). Fixed critical frontend bug where map click wasn't registering destinations. All UserDashboard features now working correctly.

resolved_bugs.issue: Map click not registering destination - onClick prop on MapContainer doesn't work with react-leaflet
resolved_bugs.fix_applied: Added MapClickHandler component using useMapEvents hook from react-leaflet

passed_tests: Backend: /api/matching/optimal-route - long distance with multiple segments
Backend: /api/matching/find-drivers - matching info includes score components
Backend: /api/matching/find-drivers - drivers sorted by score descending
Frontend: Landing page loads with MÉTRO-TAXI branding
Frontend: Login page with proper form elements
Frontend: User login redirects to dashboard
Frontend: 'Définir destination' button visible and clickable
Frontend: Vehicle count indicator shows available vehicles
Frontend: Network status (places, trajets actifs) displayed
Frontend: Destination picker mode activates with hint
Frontend: Map click sets destination correctly (AFTER FIX)
Frontend: Optimal route panel appears with route details
Frontend: Route shows km total, transbordements, minutes, efficiency
Frontend: Route segments displayed with driver info
Frontend: Side menu opens with profile, subscription, logout options
critical_code_review_comments: Map click handler was using incorrect pattern - onClick on MapContainer doesn't work with react-leaflet v4+, must use useMapEvents hook
context_for_next_testing_agent: All matching algorithm APIs tested and working. Frontend map click handler fixed. UserDashboard now properly sets destinations and displays optimal routes with segments and transfer points. The algorithm correctly calculates routes with 1.5-3km segments and up to 2 transfers.

algorithm_verification.optimal_route_calculation: Working - returns segments, transfer points, total distance, ETA, efficiency
algorithm_verification.direction_matching: Working - drivers matched by direction score
algorithm_verification.network_status: Working - shows active vehicles, seats, rides
